prompt: ALOHA protein bar brand: warm, sun-drenched photography with golden natural lighting on clean cream or white backgrounds. Deep teal-green and chocolate brown brand colors with warm cream backgrounds. Bold uppercase sans-serif headlines in teal or dark brown. Product wrappers are matte-finish with flavor-specific colors. Mood is joyful, purposeful, and indulgent-yet-clean. Organic ingredients scattered as props. Hawaiian-inspired warmth, certified organic badges visible. Create: a flavor-visualization ad. Full background is a photorealistic close-up food scene of freshly made peanut butter cups with rich dark chocolate shells cracked open to reveal creamy peanut butter filling on a rustic wooden surface with scattered peanuts and cocoa powder. Shot at 50mm f/2.8, shallow depth of field, warm bakery lighting. Top third: large bold white sans-serif headline reading 'A protein bar that tastes like freshly made peanut butter cups' with 'freshly made' in bold italic for emphasis. ALOHA Peanut Butter Cup protein bar packaged unit placed bottom-right, angled 15 degrees as if casually laid into the scene, matte wrapper with deep brown and amber tones. Bottom: semi-transparent white bar spanning full width with three stat columns separated by thin vertical lines: '14g PROTEIN' | '≤5g SUGAR' | '10g FIBER'. Very bottom edge: smaller bold sans-serif 'USDA ORGANIC | NON-GMO | PLANT-BASED'. Food is the hero — product is the payoff. 1:1 aspect ratio.

ALOHA protein bar brand: warm, sun-drenched photography with golden natural lighting on clean cream or white backgrounds. Deep teal-green and chocolate brown brand colors with warm cream backgrounds. Bold uppercase sans-serif headlines in teal or dark brown. Product wrappers are matte-finish with flavor-specific colors. Mood is joyful, purposeful, and indulgent-yet-clean. Organic ingredients scattered as props. Hawaiian-inspired warmth, certified organic badges visible. Create: a static ad on a white-to-warm golden beige gradient background, gradient fading from top to bottom. Top: large bold chocolate brown sans-serif headline reading 'So tasty you'll forget it's actually healthy.' Center: single ALOHA Peanut Butter Cup protein bar standing upright on white background, soft studio lighting. Floating near the product: a small circular teal-green badge reading 'AS LOW AS $2.92 PER BAR!' in white text. Flanking the product on both sides: four stat callouts with curved arrows pointing toward the product. Left side top: '14g' in oversized bold text with 'PROTEIN' below. Left side bottom: '≤5g' with 'SUGAR' below. Right side top: '20,000+' with 'STORES NATIONWIDE' below. Right side bottom: '7,600+' with '5-STAR REVIEWS' and five filled gold stars beneath. Arrows are simple hand-drawn-style curved lines in chocolate brown. Bottom foreground: scattered peanut butter cups, chocolate chips, and peanut pieces adding appetite appeal. No brand logo needed — product packaging shows it. Clean, informational, appetizing. 1:1 aspect ratio.

ALOHA protein bar brand: warm, sun-drenched photography with golden natural lighting on clean cream or white backgrounds. Deep teal-green and chocolate brown brand colors with warm cream backgrounds. Bold uppercase sans-serif headlines in teal or dark brown. Product wrappers are matte-finish with flavor-specific colors. Mood is joyful, purposeful, and indulgent-yet-clean. Organic ingredients scattered as props. Hawaiian-inspired warmth, certified organic badges visible. Create: a side-by-side comparison ad divided vertically into two equal halves. Left half: vibrant deep teal-green background. ALOHA Peanut Butter Cup protein bar photographed with dynamic energy — chocolate dripping and peanut butter swirling to convey indulgence. ALOHA logo in bold white upper-left. Below product: vertical stack of 4 benefits, each with a green circle checkmark emoji: '14G PROTEIN' / 'USDA ORGANIC' / '10G FIBER' / '≤5G SUGAR' in bold white uppercase. Right half: pale cream-beige background. Generic unbranded protein bar in plain brown wrapper, looking dull and unappetizing. Header: 'Other Protein Bars' in dark text. Below: vertical stack of 4 weaknesses, each with a red circle X emoji: '<12G PROTEIN' / 'NOT ORGANIC' / '<10G FIBER' / '>5G SUGAR' in bold dark uppercase. Center divider: a comic-style 'VS' burst graphic in coral-red. 1:1 aspect ratio.

ALOHA protein bar brand: warm, sun-drenched photography with golden natural lighting on clean cream or white backgrounds. Deep teal-green and chocolate brown brand colors with warm cream backgrounds. Bold uppercase sans-serif headlines in teal or dark brown. Product wrappers are matte-finish with flavor-specific colors. Mood is joyful, purposeful, and indulgent-yet-clean. Organic ingredients scattered as props. Hawaiian-inspired warmth, certified organic badges visible. Create: a product showcase ad on a warm cream-beige background. Top: large bold chocolate brown uppercase sans-serif headline: 'THE CLEANEST PROTEIN BAR ON THE SHELF'. Below headline: white rounded-rectangle CTA button with teal-green uppercase text 'SHOP NOW'. Center: ALOHA Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough protein bar in full packaging, angled slightly, hero-lit with soft studio lighting. Surrounding the product: scattered chocolate chip cookie dough balls, chocolate chips, cookie crumbles, and cocoa powder arranged in an exploded radial pattern creating visual energy and texture on the cream background surface. ALOHA protein bar brand: warm, sun-drenched photography with golden natural lighting on clean cream or white backgrounds. Deep teal-green and chocolate brown brand colors with warm cream backgrounds. Bold uppercase sans-serif headlines in teal or dark brown. Product wrappers are matte-finish with flavor-specific colors. Mood is joyful, purposeful, and indulgent-yet-clean. Organic ingredients scattered as props. Hawaiian-inspired warmth, certified organic badges visible. Create: a review-driven ad with a solid deep teal-green color block background filling the entire image. Top half: large bold italic serif text in white with curly quotation marks reading 'I finally found a protein bar that actually tastes amazing!' Directly below the quote: five large filled gold star icons in a horizontal row. Bottom left, overlapping the color background: a white rounded-corner review card with subtle shadow, containing: a small gray circular default avatar icon, beside it 'Sarah M.' in bold dark sans-serif with a small US flag emoji, below the name a blue checkmark icon with 'Verified Buyer' in small blue text. Below the reviewer info: the review body text in medium-weight dark sans-serif, reading 'I've tried every protein bar on the market and nothing comes close. The Peanut Butter Cup flavor is unreal — it tastes like an actual candy bar but with 14g of organic plant protein and only 5g of sugar. My whole family is obsessed. I literally keep a box at home and one at the office. The texture is perfect, not chalky or dry like every other...Read more' in bold teal-green text — the truncation is intentional to create curiosity. Below the review text: 'Was this review helpful?' in small gray text with a thumbs-up icon and '2.4K' beside it. Bottom right, overlapping both the card and the teal-green background: ALOHA Peanut Butter Cup protein bar in matte wrapper angled slightly toward the viewer, sitting on the color block surface with a subtle shadow beneath. 4:5 aspect ratio.
